flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Stanislaus rose 44% between 2007 and 2010 ($6.2k → $9.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Stanislaus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Stanislaus rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 (18.9% → 25.3%).
